ddls:
CREATE TABLE "river_basins" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each river basin */,
  "subbasin" INTEGER /* Sub-basin identifier */,
  "areac" REAL /* Area of the river basin */,
  "strahler" INTEGER /* Strahler order of the river basin */,
  "len2" REAL /* Length of the river basin */,
  "slo2" REAL /* Slope of the river basin */,
  "wid2" REAL /* Width of the river basin */,
  "dep2" REAL /* Depth of the river basin */,
  "elevmin" INTEGER /* Minimum elevation of the river basin */,
  "elevmax" INTEGER /* Maximum elevation of the river basin */,
  "midlat" REAL /* Midpoint latitude of the river basin */,
  "midlon" REAL /* Midpoint longitude of the river basin */,
  "river_basin_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the river basin */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the river basin data was last updated */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Geometric data for the river basin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the river basin */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the river basin */,
  "hydrological_model" TEXT /* Hydrological model used for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_river_basins_river_basin_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("river_basin_type_id") REFERENCES river_basin_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subbasins" (
  "subbasin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-basin */,
  "river_basin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the river basin the sub-basin belongs to */,
  "subbasin_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-basin */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Geometric data for the sub-basin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-basin */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the sub-basin */,
  "hydrological_model" TEXT /* Hydrological model used for sub-basin analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subbasin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subbasins_river_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("river_basin_id") REFERENCES river_basins ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the research team was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the research team's information was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team's focus and objectives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team that uploaded the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dataset is publicly accessible */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "river_basin_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each river basin type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the river basin type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the river basin type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the river basin type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydrological_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hydrological parameter */,
  "river_basin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the river basin the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hydrological parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the hydrological parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the hydrological parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the hydrological parameter was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the hydrological parameter data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrological_parameters_river_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("river_basin_id") REFERENCES river_basins ("id")
)
